message.content:
@startuml
' UML Class Diagram for Facebook Smart View

class Form {
  + constructor()
  + GetSavedAccessToken(): string
  + SaveAccessToken(string): void
  + LoginToFacebook(): LoginResult
  + LoginToFacebookAndSaveToken(): LoginResult
  + ConnectToFacebook(string): LoginResult
  + SaveRememberBox(bool): void
  + GetRememberBoxCheckedValue(): bool
}

class FormLogin {
  + constructor()
}

class FormLoader {
  + constructor()
}

class LoginLogic {
  + constructor()
  + GetSavedAccessToken(): string
  + SaveAccessToken(string): void
  + LoginToFacebook(): LoginResult
  + LoginToFacebookAndSaveToken(): LoginResult
  + ConnectToFacebook(string): LoginResult
  + SaveRememberBox(bool): void
  + GetRememberBoxCheckedValue(): bool
}

class MainForm {
  + event MainFormLoadEventArgs
}

class MainFormLoadEventArgs {
  + FinishedLoading: bool (getter, setter)
  + Message: string (getter, setter)
  + constructor()
}

class EventArgs {
  + constructor()
}

class ApplUser {
  + Name: string (getter)
  + Birthday: string (getter)
  + Gender: string (getter)
  + Age: int (getter)
  + UserLivesIn: string (getter)
  + LastEducationStudyPlace: string (getter)
  + constructor(User): void
  + GetFeed(PostFilter): FacebookObjectCollection<Post>
  + GetUserAlbums(): FacebookObjectCollection<Album>
  + GetUserProfilePicture(): string
  + PostToFolderWall(string): string
  + LikePhoto(string): bool
  + CommentPhoto(string, string): bool
}

class Album {
  + constructor()
}

class User {
  + constructor()
}

class Post {
  + constructor()
}

class PictureObjectBasic {
  + NumberOfLikes: int (getter, setter)
  + NumberOfComment: int (getter, setter)
  + PictureUrl: string (getter, setter)
  + Score: int (getter, setter)
  + Objectid: string (getter, setter)
  + constructor(string, int, int, int, string, string)
}

class PictureObject {
  + constructor(string, int, int, int, string, string, PictureBox)
  + LoadInformation()
}

class PictureBox {
  + constructor()
}

class SpecialPictureBox {
  + ObjectLocation: Point (getter, setter)
  + PictureBoxTopPhotoSize: static Size (getter)
  + PictureObject: PictureObject (getter, setter)
  + FatherPanel: Panel (getter)
  + PclLabel: Label (getter)
  + constructor(Panel)
  + SpecialPictureBoxOnClick(object, EventArgs)
  + UpdateNames(int)
  + RemoveObjectFromPanel()
  + OnMouseHover(EventArgs)
  + OnMouseLeave(EventArgs)
}

class PopularPanelMgt {
  + CurrentObjectID: string (getter, setter)
  + InformationLabel: Label (getter, setter)
  + InformationTextBox: TextBox (getter, setter)
  + PictureObjectList: List<SpecialPictureBox> (getter)
  + Instance: static PopularPanelMgt (getter)
  + constructor()
  + SetPanels(Panel, Panel)
  + TryAddToPanel(SpecialPictureBox): bool
  + getNextFreeLocationInContainer(Size, out Point): bool
}

class TopPhotosFeature {
  + constructor(AppUser, ref List<SpecialPictureBox>)
  + RankTopPhotos()
  + LoadTopPhotos()
}

class FilterItem {
  + constructor()
  + constructor(Rexex)
  + IsMatch(Post): bool
}

class FilterGroup {
  + List<FilterItem> (getter, setter)
  + Name: string (getter, setter)
  + constructor()
  + AddItem(FilterItem)
  + RemoveItem(FilterItem)
  + IsMatch(Post): bool
}

class GroupFilter {
  + FilterGroup (getter, setter)
}

class FormFilterGroup {
  + constructor()
}

class PostFilter {
  + FilterGroups: List<FilterGroup> (getter, setter)
  + constructor()
  + AddGroup(FilterGroup)
  + RemoveGroup(FilterGroup)
  + Save()
}

class FormPostFilterSettings {
  + PostFilter: PostFilter (getter, setter)
  + constructor()
}

class IXmlSerializable {
  + ReadXml(XmlReader reader): void
  + WriteXml(XmlWriter writer): void
}

class IEnumerable {
  + GetEnumerator(): IEnumerator
}

class IEnumerator {
  + constructor()
}

' Relationships

FormLogin <|-- Form
FormLoader <|-- Form
LoginLogic <|-- Form
FormLogin <|-- MainForm
FormLoader <|-- MainForm
MainFormLoadEventArgs <|-- MainForm
EventArgs <|-- MainForm
ApplUser <|-- MainForm
Album <|-- ApplUser
User <|-- ApplUser
Post <|-- ApplUser

PictureObjectBasic <|-- PictureObject
PictureObject <|-- SpecialPictureBox
SpecialPictureBox <|-- PopularPanelMgt
PopularPanelMgt <|-- TopPhotosFeature

FilterItem <|-- FilterGroup
FilterGroup <|-- GroupFilter
FilterGroup <|-- FormFilterGroup
FormFilterGroup <|-- PostFilter
PostFilter <|-- FormPostFilterSettings

' Interfaces
Form <|-- IXmlSerializable
FilterItem <|-- IEnumerable
FilterGroup <|-- IEnumerable
FormFilterGroup <|-- IEnumerable
PostFilter <|-- IEnumerable
FormPostFilterSettings <|-- IEnumerable

' Additional relationships
ApplUser --> Album : "1"
ApplUser --> User : "1"
ApplUser --> Post : "1"

' End of relationships
@enduml
